headline: Does $2.25 Billion LNP Settlement And Global License Reshape The Bull Case For Moderna (MRNA)?
summary: In early March 2026, Genevant Sciences and Arbutus Biopharma said they had reached a US$2.25 billion global settlement with Moderna over its past unauthorized use of their lipid nanoparticle delivery technology in COVID-19 vaccines, with Moderna paying US$950 million upfront in July 2026 and up to US$1.30 billion more depending on the outcome of a Section 1498 appeal. The agreement clears all related U.S. and international patent disputes, grants Moderna a global non‑exclusive license for...

headline: Moderna reaches vaccine settlement, GitLab's guidance disappoints
summary: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. US stock exchanges, in particular the NASDAQ (^IXIC, ^GSPC, ^DJI), climb following jobs data and news of potential Iran-US negotiations. Moderna (MRNA) shares jump after reaching a settlement concerning its COVID vaccine patent. And GitLab (GTLB) sales slow with the announcement of lackluster 2027 earnings guidance. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

headline: Moderna Stock Shoots Up on $2.3 Billion Patent Settlement
summary: Moderna shares rose more than 6% Wednesday morning after the company agreed to pay up to $2.25 billion to two other biotech companies to settle patent litigation over its Covid-19 vaccine.  Despite the expense, analysts said the settlement avoids a worst-case scenario for Moderna of having to pay more to resolve the litigation.  The settlement averts a trial that was scheduled to begin next week.

The settlement averts a trial that was scheduled to begin next week.
